bodyTextStart: Skip to main content PROOFOUND How it works For individuals For organizations Sign in Request a pilot Proof behind the claim Proofound turns real work into structured Proof Packs for privacy-safe hiring review before identity takes over. Proof portfolios for individuals. Evidence-based review for teams. Request a pilot Create your proof portfolio Blind by default Photo, name, contact details, prestige markers, and other identity signals are removed first. The goal is not anonymity for its own sa
label: landing
title: Proofound | Proof Behind the Claim

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Welcome back Sign in to continue to Proofound EMAIL ADDRESS * PASSWORD * Remember me Forgot password? Sign in OR CONTINUE WITH Google LinkedIn Don't have an account? Create account By signing in, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy
label: login
title: Sign In | Proofound

bodyTextStart: Skip to main content Back Join Proofound Choose the account type that fits how you'll use Proofound. Individual For professionals who want a clean proof-based portfolio link they can share today, plus matching as they grow. Continue as Individual → Organization For organizations that need a credible trust page on day 1, then one assignment and a privacy-safe shortlist. Continue as Organization → Already have an account? Sign in By creating an account, you agree to our Terms of Service and Privac
label: signup
title: Sign Up | Proofound

Request a pilot Create your proof portfolio 02 Real outcomes, not bullet points Vague summaries and floating skill lists resolve into structured outcomes, work scope, ownership, and context.
